skills.name: django-expert
skills.description: jeffallan/claude-skills -> django-expert (MIT, free/local, cherry-picked via --skill) - the genuinely-hard judgment: N+1 detection, select_related/prefetch_related, queryset optimization, indexing, migration safety (references/models-orm.md). Bundled with some DRF/JWT boilerplate that IS redundant with docs. OPTIONAL - install only if Django N+1 is a live pain; python.django.md + Context7 otherwise suffice. Verify the slug at install.
